title: IR Playbook: Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromise

detection: Deploy Sigma/YARA/Suricata detection rules for Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromise
Hunt for Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromise exploitation indicators in SIEM logs
Check EDR telemetry for post-exploitation behaviors
Review network traffic for C2 communication patterns
containment: Isolate confirmed compromised systems from network
Block threat IOCs (IPs, domains, hashes) at perimeter
Apply virtual patching for Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromise via WAF/IPS
investigation: Collect forensic artifacts from affected endpoints
Analyze malware samples in sandbox environment
Map lateral movement paths using authentication logs
eradication: Apply vendor patch for Aqua Security’s Trivy Scanner Compromise
Remove all identified malicious artifacts and persistence
Reset all credentials on affected systems
Rebuild compromised systems from verified clean images
recovery: Restore services from verified clean backups

escalation.T+0: SOC Tier 1 - Initial triage and detection deployment
escalation.T+30min: SOC Tier 2 - Deep analysis and containment
escalation.T+2hr: SOC Tier 3 - Advanced forensics if unresolved
escalation.T+4hr: CISO briefing if P1 or data breach confirmed
